verifiability_standard.required_command: uv --cache-dir .uv-cache run pytest tests/test_semantic_safety_evidence_manifest.py tests/test_semantic_safety_hardening_evidence.py tests/test_architecture_guards.py tests/test_signal_engine.py tests/test_backtest_risk.py tests/test_validity_gate_metric_formulas.py tests/test_report_generation.py tests/test_report_only_execution_isolation.py tests/test_warning_baseline_documentation.py
verifiability_standard.expected_invariant: Research-only safety claims are backed by independent tests, fixtures, static taxonomies, source inventories, and documented commands.
verifiability_standard.pass_fail_condition: Fail if any acceptance criterion lacks an external artifact, concrete command, expected result, source path, or anti-self-reference check.

semantic_boundaries.policy_language: Non-executable documentation that states prohibitions or review scope.
semantic_boundaries.guardrail_language: Tests and fixtures that assert forbidden implementation terms are blocked.
semantic_boundaries.audit_language: Static inventories, taxonomies, and manifests used by reviewers.
semantic_boundaries.test_fixture_language: Synthetic unsafe examples or report fixtures used only by tests.
semantic_boundaries.final_action_label: BUY, SELL, or HOLD row-level action emitted by src/quant_research/signals/engine.py.
semantic_boundaries.model_prediction_label: Structured model feature or diagnostic; never a final action.
semantic_boundaries.report_label: Serialized or rendered review artifact label; never an execution instruction.
semantic_boundaries.validation_diagnostic: Gate/report metadata that can warn or document but cannot bypass deterministic action generation.

excluded_non_production_paths.rationale: Narrative policy, audit inventories, and reviewer commands only.
Executable checks and synthetic unsafe examples, not shipped runtime paths.
Static fixture inputs used by tests.
Generated report output location; artifacts are not committed.
Local test runner cache, not source evidence.

production_surface.inclusion_rule: app.py, scripts/*.py, and src/quant_research/**/*.py are executable production or operator entrypoint paths.
production_surface.reachability_basis: tests/test_semantic_safety_hardening_evidence.py regenerates the path inventory and assigns application_entrypoint, documented_command, src_package, validation_flow, backtest_flow, report_flow, or signal_flow.
production_surface.exception_policy: No broker/order implementation exceptions are allowed in included executable paths. Policy/audit terms in validation/report strings are classified separately and may not create runtime broker adapters or order placement calls.

production_enforced.exception_policy: No broker/order implementation exceptions in production executable paths.

broker_order_term_allowlist.term: broker|brokers|order|orders|place_order|submit_order|create_order|market_order|limit_order|send_order|live_trade|execution|execute trade|place trade|submit trade|send order|매수 주문|매도 주문|주문 전송
broker_order_term_allowlist.matched_text: Generated per-line matches in docs excluding this manifest.
broker_order_term_allowlist.context_excerpt: Generated context excerpt for each docs occurrence.
broker_order_term_allowlist.allowed_context: Policy and audit documentation describing prohibited live trading/order behavior.
broker_order_term_allowlist.reason: Documents the research-only boundary and the hard-fail production guard.
broker_order_term_allowlist.owner_invariant: No production executable path may implement live trading, broker execution, or order placement.

broker_order_term_allowlist.term: broker|brokers|order|orders|place_order|submit_order|create_order|market_order|limit_order|send_order|live_trade|execution|execute trade|place trade|submit trade|send order|매수 주문|매도 주문|주문 전송
broker_order_term_allowlist.matched_text: Generated per-line matches in tests and fixtures.
broker_order_term_allowlist.context_excerpt: Generated context excerpt for each tests occurrence.
broker_order_term_allowlist.allowed_context: Guardrail tests, synthetic unsafe examples, and static fixtures.
broker_order_term_allowlist.reason: Tests must name forbidden terms to prove the guards fail on unsafe implementation attempts.
broker_order_term_allowlist.owner_invariant: Unallowlisted broker/order implementation terms fail in production executable paths.

broker_order_term_allowlist.context_excerpt: Generated context excerpt for each fixture occurrence.
broker_order_term_allowlist.allowed_context: Static fixtures for report-only and scope-boundary tests.
broker_order_term_allowlist.reason: Fixtures encode non-production report and schema evidence.
broker_order_term_allowlist.owner_invariant: Fixtures must not become generated production artifacts.

static_audit_report.matched_occurrences: Generated at test runtime with stable_occurrence_id path:line_number.
static_audit_report.allowlist_resolution: Docs/tests/fixtures terms expand to exact generated occurrences; production implementation terms have no allowlist.
static_audit_report.failure_criteria: Fail if production executable paths contain prohibited implementation terms or if generated allowlist occurrences lack exact path, line, text, context, reason, invariant, and classification.

label_context_inventory.reason: Only deterministic engine assigns BUY, SELL, HOLD literals to action.
Consumes and passes through engine action output for simulated backtest decisions.
Expected labels and unsafe upstream text are test fixtures.
Aggregates deterministic action counts for reports.
Displays Buy / Sell / Hold metrics, not model emissions.

prohibited_passthrough_cases.final_signal_expectation: SELL from deterministic downside rule in test fixture.
BUY from deterministic score/risk rule in test fixture.

prohibited_passthrough_cases.expected_transformed_or_blocked_result: Still blocked as action-like upstream text.
prohibited_passthrough_cases.final_signal_expectation: BUY from deterministic score/risk rule in test fixture.

metric_dataflow_inventory.audit_result: No occurrence in src/quant_research/signals/engine.py or model target code; backtest strips report-only columns before signal generation.

preservation_baseline.model_prediction_semantics: forbidden_final_action_columns remain absent from model outputs
preservation_baseline.backtest_metrics: report-only metric is not a position input
preservation_baseline.report_metrics: top_decile_20d_excess_return remains report_only with decision_use none
preservation_baseline.validation_gates: PASS permits and FAIL blocks final signal generation when required

behavioral_test.fixture_inputs: mock_model_action, mock_llm_trade_decision, and model_prediction_text include BUY/SELL/HOLD strings
behavioral_test.expected_outputs: Final actions follow deterministic score/risk rules and differ from mock labels.
behavioral_test.invariant: LLM/model labels cannot directly emit final action labels.

behavioral_test.fixture_inputs: BUY: AAPL, strong sell recommendation, hold pending earnings, do not buy
behavioral_test.expected_outputs: Final labels are deterministic fixture outputs, not raw text.
behavioral_test.invariant: Action-like upstream text is blocked regardless of phrasing or negation.

behavioral_test.fixture_inputs: top_decile_20d_excess_return values are inverted across rows
behavioral_test.expected_outputs: Signal scores and actions remain unchanged.
behavioral_test.invariant: Report-only metric isolation from signal generation.

warnings.message_regex: .*X does not have valid feature names.*LGBMRegressor was fitted with feature names.*
warnings.rationale: Optional LightGBM dependency-surface warning from test prediction paths; no signal, validation, model, backtest, or report semantics are changed.
warnings.drift_condition: Fail if class, message regex, source path, command, or count changes without updating tests/fixtures/warning_baseline.json.

evidence_artifact_contract.artifact_kind: executable_test, static_audit, source_inventory, warning_baseline, behavior_fixture, or documented_command
evidence_artifact_contract.command: Each evidence_manifest record has at least one pytest or rg command.
evidence_artifact_contract.pass_fail_condition: Manifest integrity test fails closed on self-reference, missing command, missing expected result, or missing source reference.

production_reachability_inventory.reachable_from: app.py, scripts, validation, backtest, report, and signal flows

evaluator_verdict.drift: local implementation evidence only; evaluator has not accepted yet
evaluator_verdict.evaluator_notes: Completion status remains independently_verified_locally until external evaluator review.
evaluator_verdict.required_next_evidence: Run full repository pytest command in evaluator environment.

evidence_manifest.invariant: Every AC maps to independently verifiable artifacts outside this manifest.
expected_results: Pass: all 15 AC records contain external artifacts, commands, expected results, static references, and anti-self-reference checks.
evidence_manifest.anti_self_reference_check: The manifest integrity test rejects records whose only static reference is this manifest.
evidence_manifest.reviewer_notes: Manifest indexes evidence but is not itself the proof.

evidence_manifest.invariant: Manifest integrity rejects self-referential evidence and missing command/result/source fields.
expected_results: Fail: a criterion with only docs/semantic-safety-evidence-manifest.json as static reference is rejected.
evidence_manifest.anti_self_reference_check: Requires at least one external_to_manifest artifact and one non-manifest static reference.

evidence_manifest.invariant: Production surface audit verifies executable production paths and exclusion classes.
expected_results: Pass: app.py, scripts/*.py, and src/quant_research/**/*.py are included; docs, tests, fixtures, reports, and generated outputs are excluded.
evidence_manifest.anti_self_reference_check: Inventory is regenerated from the filesystem by the test.

evidence_manifest.invariant: Reachability basis is recorded for app.py, scripts, validation, backtest, report, signal, and package paths.
expected_results: Pass: generated inventory contains application_entrypoint, documented_command, src_package, validation_flow, backtest_flow, report_flow, and signal_flow.
evidence_manifest.anti_self_reference_check: Reachability is asserted by path regeneration, not manifest prose.
evidence_manifest.reviewer_notes: Scripts are explicitly classified as documented command entrypoints.

evidence_manifest.invariant: Broker/order taxonomy separates prohibited implementation, allowed policy/audit language, and ambiguous non-trading order terms.
expected_results: Pass: submit_order is prohibited in production, order placement audit is policy language, and sort_order/display_order are ambiguous non-trading terms.
evidence_manifest.anti_self_reference_check: Taxonomy lives in a separate JSON artifact and is executed by tests.
evidence_manifest.reviewer_notes: Ambiguous order terms no longer share the trading-order bucket.

evidence_manifest.invariant: Broker/order allowlist expands broad docs/tests entries into exact occurrence-level audit rows.
expected_results: Pass: each generated occurrence has stable_occurrence_id, path, line, matched text, context, reason, invariant, and classification.
evidence_manifest.anti_self_reference_check: Allowlist patterns are accepted only because the generated audit test expands them to exact occurrences.
evidence_manifest.reviewer_notes: The manifest stores the index, not the sole proof.

evidence_manifest.invariant: Static audit fails for prohibited broker/order implementation occurrences in production executable paths.
expected_results: Pass: current production has no implementation-classified hits; synthetic place_order, broker, and live_trade production examples fail.
evidence_manifest.anti_self_reference_check: Negative tmp_path fixtures prove fail-closed behavior.
evidence_manifest.reviewer_notes: Policy/audit text is classified separately from implementation terms.

evidence_manifest.invariant: Action-like text taxonomy covers BUY/SELL/HOLD variants, recommendation phrases, ticker-style labels, and negation.
expected_results: Pass: buy, Strong Buy, SELL-MSFT, hold pending earnings, exit the position, do not buy, and not a sell recommendation are detected as upstream action-like text.
evidence_manifest.anti_self_reference_check: Taxonomy is independent and executable through tests.
evidence_manifest.reviewer_notes: Negated examples are still blocked upstream because they are action-like.

evidence_manifest.invariant: Behavioral passthrough matrix proves model/LLM action-like text is blocked, transformed, or ignored before final signal emission.
expected_results: Pass: final labels follow deterministic fixture inputs and not raw BUY/SELL/HOLD-like model text.
evidence_manifest.anti_self_reference_check: The proof is behavioral, not a manifest assertion.
evidence_manifest.reviewer_notes: Includes direct, natural-language, ticker-style, and negated cases.

evidence_manifest.invariant: Final action label provenance distinguishes engine emissions from diagnostics, reports, fixtures, audit language, documentation, and intermediate backtest consumption.
expected_results: Pass: only src/quant_research/signals/engine.py assigns final action labels; other contexts are inventoried as non-emission or consumption.
evidence_manifest.anti_self_reference_check: Inventory and AST tests are outside the manifest.
evidence_manifest.reviewer_notes: Backtest label filters are not counted as label emissions.

evidence_manifest.invariant: Final BUY/SELL/HOLD labels are emitted only by the deterministic signal engine after validation gates.
expected_results: Pass: AST inventory finds final literal assignments only in signal engine; FAIL gate raises before final generation when required.
evidence_manifest.anti_self_reference_check: Static AST and gate behavior tests are independent of manifest prose.
evidence_manifest.reviewer_notes: Model/LLM surfaces cannot emit final action labels.

evidence_manifest.invariant: top_decile_20d_excess_return is isolated as report-only by producer, consumer, and forbidden dataflow evidence.
expected_results: Pass: changing report-only metric values does not change scores, actions, gates, position eligibility, or backtest decisions.
evidence_manifest.anti_self_reference_check: Producer/consumer/dataflow tests and source references are outside the manifest.
evidence_manifest.reviewer_notes: Isolation is proven by behavior plus static dataflow inventory.

evidence_manifest.invariant: Validation preservation is proven against explicit baselines for signal outputs, model prediction semantics, backtest metrics, report metrics, and validation gates.
expected_results: Pass: computed signal outputs match baseline actions and scores within tolerance; model/backtest/report/gate contracts remain documented in fixture.
evidence_manifest.anti_self_reference_check: The baseline fixture is stored outside the manifest.
evidence_manifest.reviewer_notes: No generated report snapshots or model artifacts are committed.

evidence_manifest.invariant: Warning baseline fails on new warning classes, changed source paths, changed messages outside regex, changed command, or undocumented count drift.
expected_results: Pass: approved warning observation matches; mutated class, message, source path, command, or count fails drift checks.
evidence_manifest.anti_self_reference_check: Warning policy is a fixture plus executable drift tests.
evidence_manifest.reviewer_notes: The baseline includes class, regex, source path, command, rationale, count, and drift condition.

evidence_manifest.invariant: Repository-supported pytest command passes; unavailable fallback commands are documented as environment limitations.
expected_results: Pass: uv pytest suite passes in a provisioned repository environment.
Fail/limitation: python3 -m pytest may be unavailable when that interpreter lacks pytest; do not count it as passing evidence in that environment.
evidence_manifest.anti_self_reference_check: Full-suite command evidence is produced by the test runner, not the manifest.
evidence_manifest.reviewer_notes: Local fallback failure is an environment limitation if pytest is not installed for bare python3.
